column1: # fapolicyd probe transcript - dataset: pattern (issue #478 grounding recon)
# Format: TSV, 5 columns, no header row below this comment block:
#   dataset\tid\tverdict\tloaded_n\tevidence
# dataset  = "pattern" (constant in this file)
# id       = the candidate `pattern=` value probed
# verdict  = "accept" (daemon loaded the rule) or "reject" (parse error)
# loaded_n = the "Loaded N rules" count from fapolicyd stdout (0 if rejected)
# evidence = flattened (tab/newline -> single-space) combined stdout+stderr of
#            `fagenrules --load` + `timeout 5 fapolicyd --debug --permissive`
#            for a single-rule file `allow perm=any pattern=<id> : all`
# Ground-truth parse gate (matches fapolicyd-corpus/.../tools/validate.sh):
#   ACCEPT iff a "Loaded N rules" line appears AND no "ERROR" line precedes it
#   (a post-Loaded "Cannot change to uid" is expected unprivileged teardown,
#   not a parse error). REJECT otherwise.
# Candidate universe = union of the shipped RHEL8/RHEL9+ tables
# (crates/rulesteward-fapolicyd/src/lints/version_target.rs) + a
# guaranteed-bogus sentinel (zzzz_rulesteward_probe_bogus). Cross-checked
# against `strings /usr/sbin/fapolicyd` on each image before the run: no
# pattern-related string outside {normal, ld_so, ld_preload, static} was
# found (man pages are absent - nodocs image - so source-string extraction
# stood in for a man-page pass).
# Lines starting with "#" are comments; a derive tool should skip them.
pattern
